query:
SELECT pj.id, pj.document_id, pj.status, pj.current_step, pj.progress, pj.started_at, pj.updated_at, d.file_name, d.file_size 
FROM processing_jobs pj 
JOIN documents d ON pj.document_id = d.id 
ORDER BY pj.updated_at DESC 
LIMIT 10;
